Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st , #94 California Temporary Reroute at 69th/Bell
ShortDescription: 67 67th-69th-71st , 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st ,#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 69th, Damen, 67th and Western including normal route streets due to street blockage at 69th/Bell.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #36 Broadway Temporary Reroute near State/Division
ShortDescription: 36 Broadway buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near State/Division, due to police activity near State/Division.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#36 Broadway buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near State/Division, due to police activity near State/Division.

Northbound buses will operate via State, Walton, Clark and over regular route.

Southbound buses will operate via State, Oak, State and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: No trains between 95th/Dan Ryan and 63rd/Dan Ryan
ShortDescription: Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between 95th/Dan Ryan and 63rd/Dan Ryan due to police activity at 79th/Dan Ryan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line service has been temporarily suspended between 95th/Dan Ryan and 63rd/Dan Ryan due to police activity at 79th/Dan Ryan.

Shuttle buses have been requested between 95th/Dan Ryan and 63rd/Dan Ryan to provide connecting service.

At this time, consider other alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#29 State

#79 79th

#87 87th

We apologize for this inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
